metadata.description: Deterministic frustration detection, AST-based bash command guards, and docs-before-code enforcement for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-hooks
plugins.description: Frustration detection (profanity, caps anger, circular retries, scope drift, mild corrections) + AST-based bash guards (blocks find, grep, truncation, test output piping, package runners) + docs-guard (blocks Write/Edit of code using third-party libraries without prior doc lookup). No LLM in the hook pipeline.
